sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import './UserManagement.css'; const UserManagement = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem('accessToken'); navigate('/login'); }; const menuItems = [ { label: 'Dashboard', active: false, path: '/dashboard', icon: ( )}, { label: 'User Management', active: true, path: '/users', icon: ( )}, { label: 'Roles and Permissions', active: false, path: '#', icon: ( )}, { label: 'Service Catalog', active: false, path: '/services', icon: ( )}, { label: 'Audit Logs', active: false, path: '#', icon: ( )}, { label: 'Settings', active: false, path: '#', icon: ( )}, ]; const users = Array.from({ length: 6 }, (_, i) => ({ id: i + 1, name: 'Dr. Jamaica Martinez', initials: 'DJM', staffId: 'STF-102', username: 'dr.jamaica.martinez', role: 'Doctor', status: 'active', lastLogin: '7 hours ago' })); return (
{/* Sidebar */}
VitalMed Hospital System
{menuItems.map((item) => (
item.path !== '#' && navigate(item.path)} style={item.path !== '#' ? { cursor: 'pointer' } : {}} > {item.icon} {item.label}
))}
AD
Admin
admin@vitalmed.com
{/* Main Content */}
{/* Breadcrumb & Header */}
Dashboard / User Management

User Management

{/* All Users Panel */}

All Users

Manage employee accounts and permissions.

{/* Filter Bar */}
Roles
Status
{/* Data Table */}
{users.map((user) => ( ))}
User Username Role Status Last Login
{user.initials}
{user.name}
{user.staffId}
 {user.username} {user.role} {user.status} {user.lastLogin}
); }; export default UserManagement;
